name: Jerusalem Artichoke with Goat Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice Jerusalem artichokes thinly.
2. Cook the slices in salted water until soft. Drain.
3. Make a bechamel sauce by melting butter, adding flour, and stirring continuously. Gradually add scalded milk, continuing to stir until thickened for 15 minutes.
4. Add goat cheese and stir until melted and blended into the sauce. Remove from heat.
5. Beat egg yolk and season with nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Lightly oil an oven-safe baking pan and coat with bread crumbs.
8. Arrange Jerusalem artichoke slices in a single layer on the pan.
9. Spread goat cheese mixture evenly over the artichoke slices.
10. Sprinkle additional bread crumbs on top, then bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
